history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Indonesian man with dark, neatly styled hair and a warm smile is seated in front of a weathered green wall at night. He is wearing a black t-shirt with the white text "PIXMA" printed on the left chest and blue jeans. His left hand is raised, forming a peace sign with his index and middle fingers extended. The background features a corrugated metal shutter, a shelf with various items, a small table with a sign that says "MAXIMUM" and some writing below it, a broom leaning against the wall, and a large plastic bag filled with snacks. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with a bright light source casting a glow from the left, highlighting the man's face and the front of the scene, while the rest of the environment fades into shadow. The overall mood is casual and relaxed, capturing a candid moment outdoors. The color palette is dominated by the green of the wall, the black of the t-shirt, and the muted tones of the background elements.
